message:
refactor: Remove dead code + hoist TextEncoder/Decoder in python-do

- Hoist TextDecoder to module scope in python-do.ts (was creating new
  instance per readString call)
- Reuse module-level _encoder for all encode calls in buildImports
- Remove unused extensionPackagesData intermediary in python-do.ts and
  worker.ts
- Remove dead _TrampolineHTTPHandler class from http.py
- Remove unused importlib.machinery import from importer.py

files.patch:
@@ -167,23 +167,6 @@ def _fetch_legacy(url, method, headers, body):
     sys.exit(254)
 
 
-class _TrampolineHTTPHandler:
-    """urllib.request handler that routes all HTTP/HTTPS through the trampoline."""
-
-    def http_open(self, req):
-        return self._open(req)
-
-    def https_open(self, req):
-        return self._open(req)
-
-    def _open(self, req):
-        url = req.full_url
-        method = req.get_method()
-        headers = dict(req.header_items())
-        body = req.data
-        return fetch(url, method=method, headers=headers, body=body)
-
-
 def get(url, headers=None):
     """HTTP GET request."""
     return fetch(url, method="GET", headers=headers)

@@ -12,7 +12,6 @@
 """
 
 import importlib.abc
-import importlib.machinery
 import importlib.util
 import json
 import os
